pi_items.verified_value: Improper Records Retention Complaint (synthetic case created by setup_task.sh)
pi_items.source: setup_task.sh:19 creates case with this exact title via ArkCase API endpoint plugin/complaint. No matching case found in public government records, NARA databases, or federal agency complaint logs.

task_utils.sh:9 and setup_arkcase.sh comments - test credentials created via samba-tool in Kubernetes/Helm deployment of dev.arkcase.com LDAP domain. Verified in previous task audits (add_complaint@1 validated_pi.json).

task_utils.sh:11 and setup_arkcase.sh:250-254 - test password set during ArkCase Helm deployment initialization. This is the password for the arkcase-admin@dev.arkcase.com test account in the development environment.

pi_items.verified_value: Office of Administrative Services (generic government entity, plausible but no specific complaint found)
pi_items.source: setup_task.sh:20 - case details mention 'Office of Administrative Services'. Web search found that multiple government agencies have an 'Office of Administrative Services' (federal and state level), but no specific complaint against OAS regarding fiscal years 2021-2023 records retention was found in public records or NARA databases.

setup_task.sh:20 - case details reference the Federal Records Act. Web search and legal database (uscode.house.gov, archives.gov) confirm this is a real federal law (44 U.S.C. Chapter 31) that governs federal records management.

pi_items.verified_value: 2021-2023 (plausible recent years, no specific verified complaint found)
pi_items.source: setup_task.sh:20 - case details mention 'fiscal years 2021-2023'. No matching Federal Records Act complaints for these years involving Office of Administrative Services were found in web searches, NARA records, or federal agency databases.

pi_items.verified_value: ArkCase is a real, open-source FedRAMP-authorized case management platform
pi_items.source: Web search results confirm ArkCase (https://www.arkcase.com/) is a real, open-source case management platform used by federal agencies (FCC, federal FOIA offices, etc.). ArkCase has complaint management and records management modules.

privileged_info_summary: This task uses synthetic test data. The complaint case titled 'Improper Records Retention Complaint' is created by the task setup script (setup_task.sh) via the ArkCase API and does not exist in real government complaint databases or NARA records. The case involves the plausible but unverified scenario of the Office of Administrative Services failing to retain correspondence in violation of the Federal Records Act for fiscal years 2021-2023. The admin credentials (arkcase-admin@dev.arkcase.com / ArkCase1234!) are verified test credentials created during Kubernetes/Helm deployment in the dev.arkcase.com development environment. ArkCase is a real, open-source case management platform used by federal agencies for complaint and records management.
